name: appi-claw
description: Automated job application assistant — generates drafts via Gemini, gets Telegram approval, fills forms with Playwright, logs to Google Sheets.

tools.name: appi_claw_process
tools.description: Process a job listing through the full pipeline: draft → Telegram approve → apply → log to Sheets. Returns status, decision, draft, and message.

platform.description: Platform name (internshala, linkedin, wellfound, cold_email, dm)

tools.name: appi_claw_status
tools.description: Returns application tracker summary: total count and breakdown by status (Applied, Draft Sent, Skipped, Failed).

tools.name: appi_claw_list
tools.description: Lists recent applications from the Google Sheets tracker. Returns list of dicts with company, role, platform, status, etc.
